name: Pistachio Cake with Cream Cheese Frosting
recipeIngredient: 2 4 oz. packages Instant pistachio pudding mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients for the cake in a large bowl.
2. Pour the batter into a greased tube pan.
3. Bake at 350°F for 45-60 minutes or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
4. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.
5. Once cooled, remove the cake from the pan.
6. Prepare the cream cheese frosting by combining all ingredients in a separate bowl.
7. Frost the cooled cake with the cream cheese frosting.
